pi_items.source: Moodle official documentation confirms passwordpolicy is a binary setting where 1=enabled, 0=disabled. This enables the password policy feature in Site Administration > Security > Site security settings.
Moodle documentation confirms minpasswordlength is a valid configuration setting stored in mdl_config table. Default Moodle requirement is 8 characters; task sets it to 12 for stronger compliance.
Moodle documentation confirms minpassworddigits is a valid password policy setting. Specifies minimum number of numeric digits required in password.
Moodle documentation confirms minpasswordlower is a valid password policy setting. Specifies minimum number of lowercase letters required in password.
Moodle documentation confirms minpasswordupper is a valid password policy setting. Specifies minimum number of uppercase letters required in password.
Moodle documentation confirms minpasswordnonalphanum is a valid password policy setting. Specifies minimum number of non-alphanumeric characters required in password.
Moodle documentation confirms maxconsecutiveidentchars is a valid password policy setting that controls maximum consecutive identical characters allowed. Default is 2; setting to 3 is valid.

Moodle documentation confirms lockoutthreshold is a valid account lockout setting (Site Administration > Security > Site security settings). Specifies number of failed login attempts before account locks. Default is disabled (0); 5 is a reasonable institutional requirement.
Moodle documentation confirms lockoutwindow is the observation time window for lockout threshold (in seconds). 900 seconds = 15 minutes, a reasonable security compliance requirement.
Moodle documentation confirms lockoutduration is the automatic unlock duration after account lockout (in seconds). 900 seconds = 15 minutes, a reasonable institutional requirement.
Moodle official documentation confirms default session timeout is 2 hours. 7200 seconds = 2 hours exactly. Setting found at Site Administration > Server > Session handling.

privileged_info_summary: All eleven Moodle security configuration settings in this task are verified real configuration parameters stored in the mdl_config table. The task configures password policy with minimum length 12, requiring 2 digits, 2 lowercase letters, 2 uppercase letters, and 2 non-alphanumeric characters, with maximum 3 consecutive identical characters allowed. Account lockout is set to lock after 5 failed attempts within a 15-minute observation window, with automatic unlock after 15 minutes. Session timeout is set to the default 2 hours (7200 seconds). All claimed values are valid and correspond to institutional security compliance requirements documented in official Moodle administrative interfaces.
